name: testTheVisibilityOfTheAvailableBusinessUnitOptions
description: Verify that the Company admin can see all the company's business units in the Business unit dropdown list
descriptionHtml: Verify that the Company admin can see all the company's business units in the Business unit dropdown list

testStage.description: Verify that the Company admin can see all the company's business units in the Business unit dropdown list

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Enter the user's password in the 'New password' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Repeat new password' field
Press 'Save' button to save changed password
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Verify: Company's business units are visible
